description_long: This object is a modern, freestanding dishwasher with a sleek stainless steel exterior and a black glass control panel at the top. The front features a large, dark-tinted window set into the door, with a horizontal handle integrated just above it. The control panel is equipped with illuminated digital displays and several touch-sensitive buttons, arranged in a horizontal row. The sides are smooth and dark, with subtle paneling, while the back is a flat, metallic surface with visible fasteners. The top surface is flat and black, likely made of glass or ceramic, and the overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern stainless steel dishwasher with a black glass control panel, integrated handle, and a large front window. The design is sleek, with illuminated digital displays and touch-sensitive controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large tinted window, integrated horizontal handle, and illuminated control panel with touch buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, dark paneling and the depth of the appliance.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat metallic back with visible fasteners and no interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the dark, smooth paneling and the appliance's depth.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front, featuring a horizontal black glass strip with three illuminated rectangular touch buttons in the center and two circular touch icons on each side. There is a digital display on the right side, glowing green, and additional iconography on the left.
attribute_door_handle_style: The door handle is a wide, horizontal bar integrated just above the window, made of stainless steel, with a slightly protruding but streamlined design.
attribute_visible_buttons_or_dials: Three rectangular illuminated touch buttons are visible in the center of the control panel, with two circular touch icons on each side. All are flush with the panel and glow softly.
attribute_front_panel_design: The front panel is primarily stainless steel with a large, dark-tinted glass window in the center. The finish is sleek and smooth, with minimal seams and a modern, minimalist aesthetic.
